summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements. REQ-15 (preset songs + Reggae genre), REQ-16 (ocarina synthesis for playback), REQ-17 (backend sound presets CRUD), REQ-18 (Sound Presets UI panel), and REQ-19 (4-hole 2x2 layout) are all substantially addressed. However, several specific acceptance criteria have gaps: the delete sound preset UI (REQ-18) is missing from the frontend panel, the backend delete function evidence is unclear from the truncated diff, and REQ-18's ocarina image display in OcarinaVisual/Design Editor when loading a preset has only partial wiring.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend exposes an update function to delete a named sound preset
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show a deleteSoundPreset or equivalent function. No useDeleteSoundPreset hook is visible in useQueries.ts, suggesting the delete backend function may not be implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Users can delete a saved preset from the list
missing_requirements.reason: The SoundSettingsPanel.tsx diff shows no delete button or delete mutation call in the preset list UI. No useDeleteSoundPreset hook is visible in useQueries.ts. The Trash2 icon is imported but no delete handler for presets is shown in the truncated panel code.

missing_requirements.requirement: If the preset includes an ocarina image filename, the image is shown in OcarinaVisual/Design Editor views
missing_requirements.reason: The SettingsPage passes loadedPreset ocarinaImage to SoundSettingsPanel but does not wire it through to OcarinaDesignEditor or OcarinaVisual on the settings page. While OcarinaDesignEditor supports a presetImageUrl prop, the connection from a loaded preset to the Design Editor page is not shown in the diff.
